name: S-14 standards-add appends a new entry to .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml per the registry write contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://example.com/spec --id example-spec && [ -s .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml ] && grep -q '^- id: example-spec' .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && echo appended 1>&2
